headline: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
summary: Record Club aims to be a Letterboxd/Goodreads for music lovers. It offers a clean interface for cataloging listening habits. The platform focuses on connecting fans, unlike existing crowded alternatives.

headline: The man behind the legendary MPC, Roger Linn, stays focused with a single browser tab
summary: Roger Linn is a legendary figure in music technology. He invented the LM-1, the first sampled drum machine. Linn also created the iconic LinnDrum and MPC.

headline: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
summary: Discover 38 recommended tech deals for Memorial Day. All featured gadgets are priced at $50 or less. Find discounts on portable chargers, 4K streaming devices, and more.

headline: Hanging out in my favorite virtual coffee shop in Tokyo
summary: The author explores comfort and connection in virtual spaces. Highlights the unique appeal of a virtual Tokyo coffee shop experience. Compares the virtual experience to real-world cafe comfort.

headline: The Boys Actor Antony Starr Says Goodbye to Homelander With Spoiler-Heavy Behind-the-Scenes Photos
summary: Antony Starr, who plays Homelander, bids farewell to The Boys. He shared spoiler-heavy behind-the-scenes photos on Instagram. The post marks the end of his time portraying the character.

headline: The Best Deals Today: M5 MacBook Air, AirPods Pro 3, Monster Hunter Stories 3, and More
summary: Check out today's top tech and gaming deals. Includes discounts on the M5 MacBook Air and AirPods Pro 3. Find offers for Monster Hunter Stories 3 and other products.

headline: Kingdom Come Dev Confirms Next Installment Is an 'Open-World RPG' Set to Launch Next Fiscal Year
summary: Warhorse Studios confirms the next Kingdom Come title. The upcoming game will be an open-world RPG. It is slated for release in the next fiscal year.

headline: Dead by Daylight Players React After 'Traumatizing' Cabin Stream Confirms Jason Voorhees as New Killer
summary: Jason Voorhees confirmed as a new killer in Dead by Daylight. The announcement followed a 13-hour 'traumatizing' livestream. Fans have awaited Jason's arrival for over 10 years.

headline: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
summary: Trump claims an Iran deal is 'largely negotiated.' The deal reportedly includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Tehran confirms progress but excludes nuclear weapons from initial talks.

headline: France suspends extra EU border checks at Dover after hours-long queues
summary: France suspends extra EU border checks at Dover. The decision follows hours-long queues for travelers. Checks were halted as soaring temperatures exacerbated delays.

headline: Hottest day of year as 30.5C recorded and temperatures set to soar
summary: The UK records the hottest day of the year at 30.5C. Temperatures are predicted to continue rising. Amber heat health alerts issued for parts of England.

headline: 'Shameful' more spent on benefits than jobs for young people, says Milburn
summary: Alan Milburn criticizes welfare spending over youth employment. He deems it 'shameful' more is spent on benefits than jobs. Milburn calls for welfare reforms to address youth unemployment/education.
